entry_kind.title: Trafikinfo SE
entry_kind.description: Choose whether this entry should track traffic incidents or travel time for one predefined Trafikverket route.

filter_mode.title: Trafikinfo SE
filter_mode.description: Choose how you want to filter traffic information.

travel_time_route_scope.title: Trafikinfo SE
travel_time_route_scope.description: Browse Trafikverket's predefined travel time routes. Coverage is currently concentrated in Stockholm, with smaller coverage in Västra Götaland and Skåne.

travel_time_route.title: Trafikinfo SE
travel_time_route.description: Select one predefined Trafikverket route and optionally give the entry a custom name.

configure_coordinate.title: Trafikinfo SE
configure_coordinate.description: Filter events within a radius around a coordinate.

data.name: Name
data.road_filter_safety_bypass: Bypass road filter for safety-related messages

data_description.road_filter_safety_bypass: If enabled, events marked as safety-related by Trafikverket bypass the road filter and are always shown. 'Viktig trafikinformation' always bypasses the road filter regardless of this setting. Disable to apply road filtering strictly to all event types including Trafikmeddelande.

configure_counties.title: Trafikinfo SE
configure_counties.description: Filter events by one or more counties (or Sweden-wide).

data.name: Name
data.road_filter_safety_bypass: Bypass road filter for safety-related messages

data_description.road_filter_safety_bypass: If enabled, events marked as safety-related by Trafikverket bypass the road filter and are always shown. 'Viktig trafikinformation' always bypasses the road filter regardless of this setting. Disable to apply road filtering strictly to all event types including Trafikmeddelande.

reload_notice.title: Trafikinfo SE
reload_notice.description: Setup is complete. Click submit to finish. After setup, reload the browser page once to make sure the dashboard card is available immediately.

reconfigure_filter_mode.title: Trafikinfo SE
reconfigure_filter_mode.description: Choose how you want to filter traffic information.

reconfigure_travel_time_route_scope.title: Trafikinfo SE
reconfigure_travel_time_route_scope.description: Choose which part of Trafikverket's predefined route catalog you want to browse.

reconfigure_travel_time_route.title: Trafikinfo SE
reconfigure_travel_time_route.description: Select a new predefined route and optionally rename the entry.

error.no_routes_found: No routes were found for the selected catalog area.

route.title: Trafikinfo SE options
route.description: Rename the travel time route entry. Use reconfigure if you want to select a different route.
